raw_consumer_statement:
I am disputing multiple subscription charges made by XXXX XXXX to my XXXX XXXX account. These charges appear as ongoing subscription fees, but I did not authorize the subscription to continue for the months in question. 
I have no record or evidence of using the subscription benefits during these billing cycles, yet my XXXX XXXX was charged. Furthermore, I contacted a XXXX XXXX representative by phone and specifically requested the cancellation of the subscription. Despite this request, charges continued to be applied. 
I believe these charges are unauthorized because : I did not authorize the continuation of the subscription. 
I attempted to cancel the subscription, but my request was not honored.

The charges persisted without my use or consent.

This conduct violates 12 CFR 1026.12 ( b ) ( Regulation Z under the Truth in Lending Act ), which protects cardholders from liability for unauthorized use of a credit card and requires issuers to resolve disputes regarding unauthorized charges. 
I am requesting that these disputed subscription charges be investigated, canceled, and refunded to my account, and that XXXX XXXX provide confirmation of the cancellation of the subscription to prevent further unauthorized billing.
